subcodes.first_line: From times past, We gave unto all the glad-tidings of this blessed Day, and when it dawned from the horizon of the Divine Will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع را از قبل باین یوم مبارک بشارت دادیم و چون از افق اراده حق ظاهر شد
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prophecy and fulfillment, @rejection, opposition and persecution
